## Phase 1: Foundation
- [ ] T001 [FR-024] Create migration to alter transaction.timestamp from i32 to i64. Note: SQLite rebuilds the table internally (no ALTER COLUMN support). `migration/src/m20260406_000001_fix_transaction_timestamp.rs`
- [ ] T002 [FR-024] Register new timestamp migration in migrator `migration/src/lib.rs`
- [ ] T003 [FR-024] Update transaction model timestamp field to i64 `src/model/transaction.rs`
- [ ] T004 [P] [FR-024] Update service Transaction struct and creation logic for i64 timestamps `src/services/group.rs`
- [ ] T005 [P] [FR-024] Update route TransactionCreationRequest timestamp to Option<i64> `src/routes/group.rs`
- [ ] T006 [CLR-006] Fix PostgreSQL branch — query pg_database catalog before CREATE DATABASE (PG has no IF NOT EXISTS syntax for CREATE DATABASE) `src/main.rs`
- [ ] T029 [FR-024] Test timestamp migration against backup database `backups/money-balancer-backup-2026-04-06.sqlite`

## Phase 2: Core Features

**Legend**: `[P]` = parallelizable | `[US#]` = user scenario | `[FR-NNN]` = functional requirement | `[CLR-NNN]` = clarification reference
